title: Fundhost Limited — Consumer harm
investigation_objective: Fundhost Limited, as responsible entity of the Polen Capital Global Growth Fund, paid a $19,800 ASIC infringement notice (paid 13 February 2026) over a misleading performance chart published by its investment manager that combined a related overseas fund's performance with the Fund's own, misleadingly depicting outperformance against a benchmark index since the Fund's March 2021 inception.
scope: Paid an ASIC infringement notice of $19,800 over a misleading fund-performance chart; Payment of an infringement notice is not an admission of liability under ASIC's process
